message:
test(trauma-guard): add unit tests for trauma_guard_script.ts

Add comprehensive tests for the Python script that acts as a Claude Code
hook to block dangerous commands. 31 tests covering:
- Export validation (script structure and content)
- Python 3 syntax validation via py_compile
- Hook I/O format (JSON input/output per Claude Code spec)
- Trauma file loading (JSONL parsing, error handling)
- Edge cases (unicode, regex patterns, NO_EMOJI env var)

Includes getPythonScript() helper to fix Bun's unicode escaping of
emoji in String.raw template literals.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
